hero.name: I'm Nathaly Berroa
hero.title: Web & App Developer | Crafting clean and functional designs

about.title: About me
about.description: As a developer, my focus is on creating functional and intuitive digital experiences. I specialize in designing and developing interactive interfaces, ensuring each platform is accessible, engaging, and easy to use. I always seek to enhance user experience through optimized solutions tailored to diverse needs in web environments.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies I've been working with recently

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Some things I've built so far

isa.title: Universidad ISA Website
isa.description: Modern institutional website for Universidad ISA featuring academic programs, news, student life, and research sections. Built with responsive design and optimized user experience.

dominguez.title: Dominguez Auto Painting Website
dominguez.description: Professional and responsive website development for a painting and maintenance company, showcasing services effectively.

equinox.title: Equinox Insight Hub
equinox.description: Equinox administration dashboard - Ticket management system, banking operations, and real-time analytics. Private project (Frontend development only).

smartFarming.title: Smart Farming Platform
smartFarming.description: A responsive web platform built to teach youth in Kenya about modern, sustainable farming techniques. Originally ideated by Felix Kioni & Derrick Gucema.

mirage.title: SOFTWARE-WEB-MIRAGE
mirage.description: Web-based dealership system for managing car sales, rentals, and vehicle auctions efficiently and seamlessly.

roomlogic.title: RoomLogic (Android App)
roomlogic.description: Android hotel management app with MVVM, Rust-based REST API, push notifications, and dockerized backend on Digital Ocean.
